D

Discountable - Interface in proj4
Defines the Discountable interface.
Driver - Class in proj4
Implements the Driver class.
Driver() - Constructor for class proj4.Driver
No-arg constructor that creates a default driver with empty String as a name, 0 as the id, and AA111 as the driver license.
Driver(String, int, String) - Constructor for class proj4.Driver
Parameterized constructor that takes a name, id, and license number.
DriverTest - Class in proj4
 
DriverTest() - Constructor for class proj4.DriverTest
